name: Watermelon and feta
intro: cheeses you can use here, see Dates and Turkish Sheep's Cheese, page 280).

ingredients.item: small red onion, very thinly sliced (optional) olive oil

method: Slice the feta into large but thin pieces, or just break it by hand into rough chunks.
Arrange all the ingredients, except the olive oil, on a platter, mixing them up a little. Drizzle over some oil and serve at once.
